case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. WALTER ANIBAL VALLE HERRERA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-04-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-04-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, REPRESENTED BY JHONATTAN HERRADA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

(506)
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR OPORTUN, INC. ASSIGNED TO JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC
